Design-Language Explorer

AI-accelerator architecture — design-space exploration

What the variables mean

Active filters

Click any cell in the map below to condition on that choice. Click cells on several knobs to stack constraints; click a highlighted cell to remove it. Greyed cells have no designs left in the current slice.

Architectural design-language map

0% 50% 100%  |  ●structural commitment  |  cyan outline = active filter  |  green/red border = shifted vs. full library.

Performance envelope of the selection

The grey band is the full-library 10th–90th-percentile range and the grey tick its median — both fixed. The teal marker shows where the median of your selected designs lands. F is on a 0–1 scale (best design = 1.0); for verification complexity, power and area, lower is better.

Key mapping choices

Library: candidate accelerator designs from the converged design-space search. Conditioning filters the library; nothing is extrapolated.
